problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
